author: optimizer
name: SP8192 + 3-Layer Depth Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + QK-Gain 5.5 + Legal Score-First TTT (4 epochs) + Enhanced GPTQ SDClip
technique_summary: SP8192 + 3-Layer Depth Recurrence (L3-5) + Parallel Residuals (L7+) + QK-Gain 5.5 + EMA 0.9965 + WD 0.095 + MLP mult 4.25 + Score-First TTT (SGD 4ep LR=0.006) + Enhanced GPTQ SDClip (13.2 sigmas) + Brotli

attribution.qk_gain_optimization: Extended from 5.25 to 5.5 based on ablation studies
attribution.ttt_epoch_extension: Increased from 3 to 4 epochs for better adaptation
attribution.mlp_multiplier_boost: Increased from 4.0 to 4.25 for enhanced capacity

improvements_over_baseline.qk_gain: Increased from 5.25 to 5.5 for better attention scaling
improvements_over_baseline.ttt_epochs: Increased from 3 to 4 epochs for improved test-time adaptation
improvements_over_baseline.ttt_lr: Increased from 0.005 to 0.006 for faster convergence during TTT
improvements_over_baseline.mlp_mult: Increased from 4.0 to 4.25 for better expressivity within budget
improvements_over_baseline.matrix_clip_sigmas: Optimized from 12.85 to 13.2 for better quantization fidelity
improvements_over_baseline.embed_clip_sigmas: Optimized from 20.0 to 21.5 for embedding preservation

expected_improvement: Combined improvements target ~0.0015 BPB reduction from 1.0810 to ~1.0795 through: (1) better QK scaling, (2) extended TTT adaptation, (3) enhanced MLP capacity, (4) refined quantization clipping
